inclusions: Cultures of micro-organisms and other products of heading 30.02
Live trees and goods (including seedling vegetables) of a kind commonly supplied by nursery gardeners or florists for planting or for ornamental use
Bouquets, floral baskets, wreaths and similar articles made wholly or partly of goods of heading 06.03 or 06.04

exclusions.condition: Potatoes, onions, shallots, garlic or other products of Chapter 7
Collages or similar decorative plaques of heading 97.01 made wholly or partly of flowers/leaves
Roots of heading 12.12 (e.g. chicory roots, manioc roots if not falling in Chapter 6)
